recommendations.title: Temple Grandin
recommendations.overview: A biopic of Temple Grandin, an autistic American who has become one of the leading scientists in humane livestock handling.

recommendations.title: Threads
recommendations.overview: Documentary style account of a nuclear holocaust and its effect on the working class city of Sheffield, England; and the eventual long run effects of nuclear war on civilization.

recommendations.title: L.A. Story
recommendations.overview: With the help of a talking freeway billboard, a "wacky weatherman" tries to win the heart of an English newspaper reporter, who is struggling to make sense of the strange world of early-90s Los Angeles.

recommendations.title: The Bodyguard
recommendations.overview: A former Secret Service agent grudgingly takes an assignment to protect a pop idol who's threatened by a crazed fan. At first, the safety-obsessed bodyguard and the self-indulgent diva totally clash. But before long, all that tension sparks fireworks

recommendations.title: Volcano
recommendations.overview: An earthquake shatters a peaceful Los Angeles morning and opens a fissure deep into the earth, causing lava to start bubbling up. As a volcano begins forming in the La Brea Tar Pits, the director of the city's emergency management service, working wi

recommendations.title: Hacksaw Ridge
recommendations.overview: WWII American Army Medic Desmond T. Doss, who served during the Battle of Okinawa, refuses to kill people and becomes the first Conscientious Objector in American history to receive the Congressional Medal of Honor.

recommendations.title: Ran
recommendations.overview: Shakespeare's King Lear is reimagined as a singular historical epic set in sixteenth-century Japan where an aging warlord divides his kingdom between his three sons.

recommendations.title: The Windermere Children
recommendations.overview: The story of the pioneering project to rehabilitate child survivors of the Holocaust on the shores of Lake Windermere.

recommendations.title: Wind River
recommendations.overview: An FBI agent teams with the town's veteran game tracker to investigate a murder that occurred on a Native American reservation.

recommendations.title: Lee
recommendations.overview: The true story of photographer Elizabeth "Lee" Miller, a fashion model who became an acclaimed war correspondent for Vogue magazine during World War II.
